title: Ten thousand short lines, covering the wall evenly

rule.instruction: Ten thousand lines about 10 inches (25 cm) long, covering the wall evenly.

restrictions: Faithful in spirit, scaled to the 300x300mm wall: a dense field of MANY short strokes (the new strokeField generator places them on a jittered grid so they cover the wall EVENLY) of roughly uniform length, hand-drawn. Stroke count and length scaled down from 'ten thousand / 10 inches'. Monochrome black on white. Squarely on the governing organic taste, so the 16 lean DENSE + ENERGETIC (per R10): mostly smooth FLOW-FIELD orientations (organic swirling coverage) plus random scatters, a couple aligned controls; energetic hand (jitter 4-6); spanning density (count) and flow scale for range.
